headlines.description: A Nicolas Pépé brace powered Ivory Coast to a 2-0 win over Curacao.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ivory Coast make WC knockouts for the first time with 2-0 win over Curaçao

headlines.description: Ecuador produced a rousing fightback to come from behind and beat Germany 2-1 in their final Group E match in New Jersey to put themselves into the last 32 of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ecuador stun Germany to enter World Cup knockouts

headlines.description: Japan and Sweden booked their places in the knockout phase of the World Cup as they drew 1-1 in their final Group F clash in Dallas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Japan, Sweden share points, book knockout spots

headlines.description: Brian Brobbey scored his third goal of the World Cup, the Netherlands got a pair of goals that deflected off Tunisia into its own net, and the Dutch rolled in the rain to a 3-1 victory Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands see off Tunisia, set up Morocco clash

headlines.description: Australia and Paraguay played to a 0-0 draw Thursday night in a result that clinched a spot in the knockout round of the World Cup for the Socceroos and will likely be enough for the Paraguayans to advance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Australia advance with Paraguay likely to join

headlines.description: Kaan Ayhan scored on the final kick of the match, and Türkiye beat the United States 3-2 Thursday night for its only win of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Türkiye beats much-changed USMNT with last-gasp goal

headlines.description: France forward Ousmane Dembélé scored a first-half hat trick, including one off a feed from Kylian Mbappé, to help his team beat Norway 4-1 at the World Cup on Friday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dembélé hat-trick helps France past much-changed Norway

headlines.description: Senegal racked up the goals on 10-man Iraq in a 5-0 victory Friday that boosted their hopes of reaching the World Cup knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Senegal thrash Iraq, on course for knockouts
